title: AbilityCraft for Cobblemon
description: With this addon you can now craft ability capsule and patch in minecraft 1.21.1 for the 1.6 record catch update ! Simply put the pack in your datapack folder
body: With this addon you can now craft ability capsule and patch in minecraft 1.21.1 for the 1.6 record catch update ! Simply put the pack in your datapack folder
